WeaponTraitDef.label: shortened stock
WeaponTraitDef.description: A shortened stock that reduces weight. The weapon becomes lighter, more compact, and easier to handle in tight spaces.

WeaponTraitDef.label: telescopic stock
WeaponTraitDef.description: An adjustable stock that improves fit and ergonomics. A steadier stance gives better accuracy.

WeaponTraitDef.label: fold stock
WeaponTraitDef.description: A folding stock with a solid lockup. It provides a stable shoulder rest for accurate fire while also reducing weight a little.

WeaponTraitDef.label: stabilizer brace
WeaponTraitDef.description: A brace that supports the user's arm. It greatly improves stability and short-range accuracy.
